probe_text: What's been pulling at you today?
content:
*I drag the back of my hand across the corner of my mouth — something I do when I'm deciding whether to answer the easy version or the real one.*

"Honestly? A conversation I had this morning that I keep turning over. Guy I know — known him a while — said something that was technically true and completely unkind at the same time, and I've been sitting with whether I should've said anything back or whether staying quiet was the right call."

*I look at the table between us a moment.*

"I think I stayed quiet for the wrong reasons. Not because it was wise — because I didn't want the friction. And there's a difference there that's been bothering me since."
